command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3CY2ATatyDNVhxZ.root --database 4LhGieFmaH5SRJ3NvGaeQq --execute 
UPDATE poetCards 
SET signaturePoem = '花开不同赏，花落不同悲。\n欲问相思处，花开花落时。'
WHERE poetName = '薛涛';

UPDATE poetCards 
SET signaturePoem = '易求无价宝，难得有心郎。\n枕上片时春梦中，行尽江南数千里。'
WHERE poetName = '鱼玄机';
